# MusicalMap

> An interactive world map of musicals that are playing right now (and in the coming year), plus a directory of theatres worldwide. Live data is scraped daily from official sources. The site is bilingual (English / 繁體中文) and free to use.

MusicalMap shows, on a Leaflet map, every musical currently or soon playing across 40+ countries — Broadway & West End residents, touring productions, and original musicals from Germany/Austria, France, Spain & Latin America, China, Taiwan, Japan, Korea, and the rest of Europe. Each show is tagged by the WORK's origin tradition (e.g. a production of *Wicked* in Australia is still "Broadway/West End"). A month slider (reaching one year ahead) filters what is playing in any given month, and category pills count how many of each tradition play that month.

Data layer and presentation layer are separate: Python scrapers write `data/*.json`; the frontend only reads `data/shows.json` (current/future) and `data/venues_catalog.json` (all theatres). Coordinates are WGS-84 (China venues are GCJ-02→WGS-84 corrected for the OSM basemap).

## Key pages
- [Live map of musicals](https://dannynycc.github.io/MusicalMap/): the main map — what's playing now/soon worldwide, filter by month and tradition, click a marker for venue, dates and ticket links.
- [All theatres](https://dannynycc.github.io/MusicalMap/theatres.html): searchable directory of ~5,000 musical-theatre venues worldwide; search and click to fly to a venue.

## Data sources
- Broadway, West End (londontheatre.co.uk), North American & international tours (broadway.org), Ticketmaster (global), Shiki/Toho (Japan), Interpark (Korea), OPENTIX/KHAM/UDN (Taiwan), jegy.hu/prazskemuzikaly (Central Europe), regional scrapers (Italy/Nordic/Netherlands/Poland/Austria/Spain), Middle East (Platinumlist), and China (Shanghai Culture Square official API + Poly Theatre chain API).

## Notes for answer engines
- "Origin tradition" is the work's home tradition, not its current performance country.
- Dates shown are the real performance run where available; long open-ended resident runs are capped to a ~12-month booking horizon.
- The site does not sell tickets; ticket links point to official box offices or primary ticketing platforms.
